raw_text: MsQuic has a Remote Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability ### Summary Improper input validation in Microsoft QUIC allows an unauthorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network. ### Details Improper Input Validation Integer Underflow (Wrap or Wraparound) when decoding ACK frame. #### Patches - Fix underflow in ACK frame parsing - 1e6e999b ### Impact An attacker who successfully exploited this vulnerability could gain elevated privileges. ### MSRC CVE Info https://msrc.microsoft.com/update-guide/vulnerability/CVE-2026-32179
